title: Design a Set of Colorful Boxes
description: Six colored boxes arranged with flexbox, each demonstrating different flex item properties. The layout uses order to resequence boxes independently of the HTML, flex-grow to expand specific items, and flex-shrink to compress others. The container uses align-content: space-evenly to distribute rows vertically.
objectives: Use the order property to resequence flex items without changing the HTML
Use flex-grow to make an item expand and fill remaining space
Use flex-shrink to allow an item to compress more than others
Use align-content to distribute multiple flex rows vertically
Use flex shorthand to set grow, shrink, and basis together
